zh.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Andrews於1632年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本時，她的父親Mr Andrews32歲，母親Sarah Adams30歲。她於1651年與Robert Eames在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1710年3月22日在她的家鄉享年78歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Andrews于1632年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本时，她的父亲Mr Andrews32岁，母亲Sarah Adams30岁。她于1651年与Robert Eames在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1710年3月22日在她的家乡享年78岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本。

nameMeanings.name: Andrews
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Andrew , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This is the usual southern English patronymic form, also found in Wales; the Scottish and northern English form is Anderson . In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Polish Andrzejewski , Slovenian Andrejčič, Serbian and Croatian Andrić (see Andric ), and Czech Ondráček (see Ondracek ).
Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Mac Aindreis or Irish Mac Aindriú, see McAndrew .

History: This was a common name among the early settlers in New England. Robert Andrews emigrated in 1635 from Norwich, England, to Ipswich, MA. Even before 1635, one Thomas Andrews is recorded as being established in Hingham. A certain William Andrews was a member of John Davenport's company, which sailed from Boston in 1638 to found the New Haven colony.

variants.name: Andrus
meanings: History: William Andrus came to Boston in 1635 and moved to New Haven in 1639, where he died in 1676.

variants.name: Andrew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the usual vernacular English form (recorded from the 13th century onward) of the New Testament Greek personal name Andreas . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech Ondřej (see Ondrey ) and Albanian Ndreu , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Andrews ).
History: The surname Andrew was first brought to North America from England by Robert Andrew (died 1668), who settled in Boxford, MA.

variants.name: Andros
meanings: English: variant of   Andrews  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

American shortened form of Greek Andronikos (see Andron 2) or of any other surname based on a personal name beginning with Andr- (from andros, genitive of anēr ‘man, male’), e.g. Androutsos, including their patronymics and other derivatives, such as Andronikidis.

History: William Andros came to VA in 1617 and died there c. 1655. Sir Edmund Andros (1637–1714) was the British colonial governor of several provinces in America between 1674 and 1698, most notably NY (1674–81).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Andrews was born in 1632, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Mr Andrews, was 32 and her mother, Sarah Adams, was 30. She married Robert Eames in 1651, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 22 March 1710, in her hometown, at the age of 78, and was buried in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

Elle a épousé Robert Eames en 1651, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 mars 1710, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Andrewsが1632年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで生まれた時，父Mr Andrewsは32歳，母Sarah Adamsは30歳であった。1651年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンでRobert Eamesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1710年3月22日に故郷で78歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンにて埋葬された。

ko.Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 헬스퍼드
ko.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Andrews(이)가 1632년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Mr Andrews(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Adams(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1651년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 Robert Eames(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1710년 3월 22일 그녀의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에 묻혔다.

ru.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Andrews родилась в 1632 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Mr Andrews было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah Adams, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Eames в 1651 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 22 марта 1710 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
